_meta.description: Finance document logic for budget/forecast/actual precedence, evidence controls, and period/currency/entity guardrails.

definition.en: Posted accounting results and realized performance.
definition.pt: Posted accounting results and realized performance.

definition.en: Model allocating shared costs to units/products.
definition.pt: Model allocating shared costs to units/products.

definition.en: Full-year strategic financial plan.
definition.pt: Full-year strategic financial plan.

definition.en: Assets, liabilities, and equity at a date.
definition.pt: Assets, liabilities, and equity at a date.

definition.en: Executive-level summary prepared for board meetings.
definition.pt: Executive-level summary prepared for board meetings.

definition.en: Contracted bookings and revenue backlog position.
definition.pt: Contracted bookings and revenue backlog position.

definition.en: Narrative assumptions underpinning the budget.
definition.pt: Narrative assumptions underpinning the budget.

definition.en: Planned amounts approved before the period starts.

definition.en: Planned capital projects and investment spend.
definition.pt: Planned capital projects and investment spend.

definition.en: Collections versus due receivables.
definition.pt: Collections versus due receivables.

definition.en: Cash inflows/outflows split by activity class.
definition.pt: Cash inflows/outflows split by activity class.

definition.pt: Aggregation by cost center hierarchy.

definition.en: Performance by country/legal entity.
definition.pt: Performance by country/legal entity.

definition.pt: Metrics and tests for financing covenants.

definition.en: Detailed expense by nature/center/period.
definition.pt: Detailed expense by nature/center/period.

definition.en: Expected values updated during the period.
definition.pt: Expected values updated during the period.

definition.en: Workforce counts and cost drivers by function.
definition.pt: Workforce counts and cost drivers by function.

definition.en: Hospitality metrics including RevPAR/ADR/Occupancy.
definition.pt: Hospitality metrics including RevPAR/ADR/Occupancy.

definition.en: Inventory turnover and slow-moving stock.
definition.pt: Inventory turnover and slow-moving stock.

definition.en: Periodic investor communication of financial performance.
definition.pt: Periodic investor communication of financial performance.

definition.en: Detailed posting-level accounting entries.
definition.pt: Detailed posting-level accounting entries.

definition.en: Curated KPI view with targets and trends.
definition.pt: Curated KPI view with targets and trends.

definition.en: Internal profit and loss report by management dimensions.
definition.pt: Internal profit and loss report by management dimensions.

definition.en: Close process pack with reconciliations and commentary.
definition.pt: Close process pack with reconciliations and commentary.

definition.en: Bridge explaining operating expense movement.
definition.pt: Bridge explaining operating expense movement.

definition.en: Supplier payment obligations by aging bucket.
definition.pt: Supplier payment obligations by aging bucket.

definition.en: Model translating cost and target margin to prices.
definition.pt: Model translating cost and target margin to prices.

definition.en: Supplier/category spend breakdown.
definition.pt: Supplier/category spend breakdown.

definition.en: Margin profile by product family.
definition.pt: Margin profile by product family.

definition.en: Bridge from prior profit to current profit.
definition.pt: Bridge from prior profit to current profit.

definition.en: Quarterly business review package.
definition.pt: Quarterly business review package.

definition.en: Property-level NOI/cap-rate/occupancy details.
definition.pt: Property-level NOI/cap-rate/occupancy details.

definition.en: Customer receivable exposure by aging bucket.
definition.pt: Customer receivable exposure by aging bucket.

definition.en: Detailed revenue by customer/product/period.
definition.pt: Detailed revenue by customer/product/period.

definition.en: TTM rolling view for revenue and profit metrics.
definition.pt: TTM rolling view for revenue and profit metrics.

definition.en: Bridge explaining revenue movement between periods.
definition.pt: Bridge explaining revenue movement between periods.

definition.en: Model with base/upside/downside assumptions.
definition.pt: Model with base/upside/downside assumptions.

definition.en: Performance by segment/business unit.
definition.pt: Performance by segment/business unit.

definition.en: Output table showing metric response to assumptions.
definition.pt: Output table showing metric response to assumptions.

definition.en: External P&L prepared under reporting standards.
definition.pt: External P&L prepared under reporting standards.

definition.en: Cash positions, debt maturity, liquidity buffers.
definition.pt: Cash positions, debt maturity, liquidity buffers.

definition.en: Ledger account balances before adjustments.
definition.pt: Ledger account balances before adjustments.

definition.en: Report focused on budget/forecast deltas and drivers.
definition.pt: Report focused on budget/forecast deltas and drivers.

definition.en: Rapid weekly indicators for short-cycle steering.
definition.pt: Rapid weekly indicators for short-cycle steering.

definition.en: Receivable/payable/inventory diagnostics.
definition.pt: Receivable/payable/inventory diagnostics.

definition.en: Schedule listing audit adjustments proposed or accepted during an audit engagement.
definition.pt: Cronograma listando ajustes de auditoria propostos ou aceitos durante um trabalho de auditoria.

definition.en: Statement reconciling book balance to bank statement balance with outstanding items.
definition.pt: Demonstrativo que concilia o saldo contábil com o saldo do extrato bancário incluindo itens pendentes.

definition.en: Capital expenditure authorization request with business case and ROI justification.
definition.pt: Formulário de solicitação de investimento de capital com caso de negócio e justificativa de retorno.

definition.en: Hierarchical listing of all general ledger accounts used by the entity.
definition.pt: Listagem hierárquica de todas as contas do razão geral utilizadas pela entidade.

definition.en: Report detailing expenses and allocations for a specific cost center.
definition.pt: Relatório detalhando despesas e alocações para um centro de custo específico.

definition.en: Document issued to reduce the amount owed by a customer, referencing an original invoice.
definition.pt: Documento emitido para reduzir o valor devido por um cliente, referenciando a fatura original.

definition.en: Schedule of outstanding debt instruments with maturity dates, interest rates, and covenants.
definition.pt: Cronograma de instrumentos de dívida em aberto com datas de vencimento, taxas de juros e cláusulas.

definition.en: Corporate policy document defining reimbursable expense categories, limits, and approval workflows.
definition.pt: Documento de política corporativa definindo categorias de despesas reembolsáveis, limites e fluxos de aprovação.

definition.en: Itemized report of employee expenditures submitted for reimbursement with approval status.
definition.pt: Relatório detalhado de despesas do funcionário submetido para reembolso com status de aprovação.

definition.en: Register of fixed assets with acquisition cost, depreciation method, and net book value.
definition.pt: Registro de ativos fixos com custo de aquisição, método de depreciação e valor contábil líquido.

definition.en: Extract of general ledger transactions for a specified account range and period.
definition.pt: Extrato de transações do razão geral para uma faixa de contas e período especificados.

definition.en: Commercial document requesting payment for goods or services delivered.
definition.pt: Documento comercial solicitando pagamento por bens ou serviços entregues.

definition.en: Supporting documentation for manual journal entries including calculations and approvals.
definition.pt: Documentação de suporte para lançamentos contábeis manuais incluindo cálculos e aprovações.

definition.en: Legal agreement specifying loan terms, repayment schedule, interest rate, and covenants.
definition.pt: Contrato legal especificando termos do empréstimo, cronograma de pagamento, taxa de juros e cláusulas.

definition.en: Internally prepared financial statements for management decision-making, not externally audited.
definition.pt: Demonstrações financeiras preparadas internamente para tomada de decisão gerencial, não auditadas externamente.

definition.en: Detailed listing of employee compensation, deductions, and net pay for a pay period.
definition.pt: Listagem detalhada de remuneração, deduções e salário líquido dos funcionários por período de pagamento.

definition.en: Analytical report categorizing procurement expenditures by vendor, category, and period.
definition.pt: Relatório analítico categorizando gastos de compras por fornecedor, categoria e período.

definition.en: Filed tax return document for a specific jurisdiction and tax year.
definition.pt: Declaração de imposto de renda arquivada para uma jurisdição e ano fiscal específicos.

definition.en: Report showing current cash positions, investments, and borrowings across all bank accounts.
definition.pt: Relatório mostrando posições atuais de caixa, investimentos e empréstimos em todas as contas bancárias.

definition.en: Analytical report on current assets minus current liabilities with trend analysis.
definition.pt: Relatório analítico sobre ativos circulantes menos passivos circulantes com análise de tendência.

pt: análise de capital de giro líquido

definition.en: Report aging outstanding vendor payables by days past due brackets.
definition.pt: Relatório que classifica contas a pagar de fornecedores por faixas de dias de atraso.

definition.en: Report aging outstanding customer receivables by days past due brackets.
definition.pt: Relatório que classifica contas a receber de clientes por faixas de dias de atraso.

definition.en: Forward-looking financial projection based on assumptions and trend extrapolation.
definition.pt: Projeção financeira prospectiva baseada em premissas e extrapolação de tendências.

definition.en: Comprehensive yearly report including audited financials, management discussion, and governance disclosures.
definition.pt: Relatório anual abrangente incluindo demonstrações financeiras auditadas, discussão da administração e divulgações de governança.

definition.en: Report measuring compliance with financial covenants in loan or bond agreements.
definition.pt: Relatório medindo conformidade com cláusulas financeiras em contratos de empréstimo ou títulos.

definition.en: Reconciliation of balances and transactions between related legal entities within a group.
definition.pt: Conciliação de saldos e transações entre entidades legais relacionadas dentro de um grupo.

definition.en: Documentation supporting arm's length pricing for intercompany transactions across jurisdictions.
definition.pt: Documentação que fundamenta preços de transferência em condições de mercado para transações intercompany entre jurisdições.

definition.en: Presentation deck prepared for investor communications with key financial highlights and outlook.
definition.pt: Apresentação preparada para comunicação com investidores com destaques financeiros e perspectivas.

definition.en: Public announcement of quarterly or annual financial results including GAAP and non-GAAP measures.
definition.pt: Comunicado público de resultados financeiros trimestrais ou anuais incluindo medidas GAAP e não-GAAP.

definition.en: Filing submitted to a regulatory body such as SEC (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) or equivalent authority.
definition.pt: Arquivo submetido a um órgão regulador como a SEC (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K) ou autoridade equivalente.

definition.en: Document filed with regulators providing shareholders with voting and governance information.
definition.pt: Documento arquivado junto a reguladores fornecendo aos acionistas informações de votação e governança.

definition.en: Explanatory notes accompanying financial statements with accounting policies and detail disclosures.
definition.pt: Notas explicativas que acompanham as demonstrações financeiras com políticas contábeis e divulgações detalhadas.

definition.en: Financial reporting broken down by operating segments as defined by accounting standards.
definition.pt: Relatório financeiro segmentado por segmentos operacionais conforme definido pelas normas contábeis.

definition.en: Assessment evaluating an entity's ability to continue operations for at least 12 months.
definition.pt: Avaliação que analisa a capacidade de uma entidade de continuar operando por pelo menos 12 meses.

definition.en: Analysis testing whether goodwill carrying value exceeds fair value for each reporting unit.
definition.pt: Análise que testa se o valor contábil do ágio excede o valor justo para cada unidade geradora de caixa.

pt: teste de redução ao valor recuperável

definition.en: Actuarial valuation of defined benefit pension obligations and plan assets.
definition.pt: Avaliação atuarial das obrigações de planos de previdência de benefício definido e ativos do plano.

questionTemplate.en: Numeric table and commentary disagree. Should I prioritize numeric evidence?
questionTemplate.pt: Tabela numérica e comentário divergem. Devo priorizar evidência numérica?

questionTemplate.en: Which entities should be included in this comparison?
questionTemplate.pt: Quais entidades devem ser incluídas nesta comparação?

questionTemplate.en: I found values without explicit currency. Which currency should I assume?
questionTemplate.pt: Encontrei valores sem moeda explícita. Qual moeda devo assumir?

questionTemplate.en: I detected duplicate tables. Should I keep the most recent or the audited version?
questionTemplate.pt: Detectei tabelas duplicadas. Devo manter a versão mais recente ou auditada?

questionTemplate.en: Should I use the latest forecast version for outlook?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo usar a versão mais recente da previsão para outlook?

questionTemplate.en: I could not find the required section. Which section name should I search next?
questionTemplate.pt: Não encontrei a seção necessária. Qual nome de seção devo buscar em seguida?

questionTemplate.en: Which reporting period should I anchor this answer to?
questionTemplate.pt: A qual período de reporte devo ancorar esta resposta?

questionTemplate.en: I found multiple versions. Should I keep only the latest approved one?
questionTemplate.pt: Encontrei múltiplas versões. Devo manter apenas a mais recente aprovada?

questionTemplate.en: These figures appear to come from different accounting frameworks. Should I flag the GAAP vs IFRS difference?
questionTemplate.pt: Estes valores parecem vir de normas contábeis diferentes. Devo sinalizar a diferença entre GAAP e IFRS?

questionTemplate.en: Should I identify and pair the elimination journals for these intercompany balances?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo identificar e associar os lançamentos de eliminação para estes saldos intercompany?

questionTemplate.en: This transfer pricing document needs arm's length standard reference. Which TP method applies?
questionTemplate.pt: Este documento de preços de transferência precisa de referência ao padrão arm's length. Qual método de TP se aplica?

questionTemplate.en: This board pack projection needs a version date. Which version date should I anchor to?
questionTemplate.pt: Esta projeção do pacote do conselho precisa de uma data de versão. Qual data de versão devo utilizar?

questionTemplate.en: Which measurement period and compliance status should I reference for this covenant test?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual período de medição e status de conformidade devo referenciar para este teste de covenant?

questionTemplate.en: Should I show both pre-adjustment and post-adjustment figures for this audit entry?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo mostrar os valores pré-ajuste e pós-ajuste para este lançamento de auditoria?

questionTemplate.en: This GL extract lacks account hierarchy context. Which level of the chart of accounts should I map to?
questionTemplate.pt: Este extrato do razão não possui contexto de hierarquia de contas. A qual nível do plano de contas devo mapear?

questionTemplate.en: Which pay period boundaries (start/end dates) should I use for this payroll data?
questionTemplate.pt: Quais limites de período de pagamento (datas de início/fim) devo usar para estes dados de folha?

questionTemplate.en: This expense report needs approval status. Should I include only approved items or all submissions?
questionTemplate.pt: Este relatório de despesas precisa de status de aprovação. Devo incluir apenas itens aprovados ou todas as submissões?

questionTemplate.en: Which tax jurisdiction (federal, state, or foreign) does this return apply to?
questionTemplate.pt: A qual jurisdição fiscal (federal, estadual ou estrangeira) esta declaração se aplica?

questionTemplate.en: Which depreciation method (straight-line, declining balance, etc.) is used for these assets?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual método de depreciação (linear, saldo decrescente, etc.) é utilizado para estes ativos?

questionTemplate.en: Should I break down the debt by maturity bands (current, 1-3 years, 3-5 years, 5+ years)?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo detalhar a dívida por faixas de vencimento (corrente, 1-3 anos, 3-5 anos, 5+ anos)?

questionTemplate.en: Should I segregate outstanding deposits in transit from outstanding checks?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo separar os depósitos em trânsito dos cheques pendentes de compensação?

questionTemplate.en: Which aging brackets should I use (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ days)?
questionTemplate.pt: Quais faixas de vencimento devo usar (0-30, 31-60, 61-90, 90+ dias)?

questionTemplate.en: Are these management (unaudited) figures or audited financials? This distinction affects reliability.
questionTemplate.pt: Estes são valores gerenciais (não auditados) ou demonstrações auditadas? Esta distinção afeta a confiabilidade.

questionTemplate.en: Which regulatory form type is this (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K, or other)?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual é o tipo de formulário regulatório (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K ou outro)?

questionTemplate.en: Should I present GAAP figures alongside non-GAAP adjustments with a reconciliation table?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo apresentar os valores GAAP junto com os ajustes não-GAAP com uma tabela de reconciliação?

questionTemplate.en: Which aggregation criteria define these operating segments?
questionTemplate.pt: Quais critérios de agregação definem estes segmentos operacionais?

questionTemplate.en: What is the 12-month forward-looking assessment date for this going concern evaluation?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual é a data base da avaliação prospectiva de 12 meses para esta análise de continuidade operacional?

questionTemplate.en: Which reporting unit does this goodwill impairment test apply to?
questionTemplate.pt: A qual unidade geradora de caixa este teste de impairment de ágio se aplica?

questionTemplate.en: Which actuarial assumption set (discount rate, salary growth, mortality table) applies to this valuation?
questionTemplate.pt: Qual conjunto de premissas atuariais (taxa de desconto, crescimento salarial, tábua de mortalidade) se aplica a esta avaliação?

questionTemplate.en: Which financial statement line item does this footnote relate to?
questionTemplate.pt: A qual rubrica das demonstrações financeiras esta nota explicativa se refere?

questionTemplate.en: At which hierarchy level should I extract accounts (parent, child, or leaf level)?
questionTemplate.pt: Em qual nível hierárquico devo extrair as contas (nível pai, filho ou folha)?

questionTemplate.en: Which originating invoice number does this credit memo reference?
questionTemplate.pt: A qual número de fatura original este memorando de crédito se refere?

questionTemplate.en: Should I compare this capex request against the approved budget and show the variance?
questionTemplate.pt: Devo comparar esta solicitação de capex com o orçamento aprovado e mostrar a variação?
